reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar nafta y de un surtidor me hicieron señas que vaya a otro, en el otro ya estaba esperando que me atiendan y un empleado me dijo que estaba cerrado, otro que era el cambio de turno.
Mejoren la atención!

(Translated by Google)
I went to get gas, and at one pump they signaled me to go to another. At the second pump, I was already waiting to be served, and one employee told me it was closed, another said it was a shift change.
Improve your customer service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReHNEdWhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El precio del taller carisimo, regrese 4 veces y no me repararon la dirección hidráulica  a pesar de haberme cobrado muchos pesitos,
Nunca mas,rumbo a defensa al consumidor.
Y próximamente ex socio del aca.

(Translated by Google)
The workshop's prices were outrageous. I went back four times and they still didn't fix my power steering despite charging me a fortune. Never again. I'm heading to consumer protection.

And soon to be a former member of the ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbmQ3WnR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima la atencion del tachero. Q me atendio. Nose si todos son asi pero el que me atendio le dije si me podia cobrar con tarjeta en plan Z y no me dio bola al final me cobro en una sola cuota y con una cara de mala gente. Ojala cambien la forma de atencion. Desde ya muchas gracias.

(Translated by Google)
The taxi driver's service was terrible. I don't know if they're all like that, but I asked if he could charge me by card on a prepaid plan, and he completely ignored me. In the end, he charged me in full and with a really nasty look on his face. I hope they change their customer service. Thanks in advance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnaHRiWnZBRRAB
